falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 120% resistance level of the previous bullish trend (e.g., $150,000 for Bitcoin)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this threshold would confirm a sustained bullish trend, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal and suggesting the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 2x the 30-day average volume on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate a blowoff top is occurring, contradicting the current 'HOLD' and suggesting the pattern is a false bottom rather than a valid reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 enters a confirmed bear market (drops 20% from a recent high) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A broad market collapse would invalidate the pattern's similarity to the 2022 bottom, as the current environment would be fundamentally different, proving the 'UNKNOWN' verdict incorrect.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
